tasks.description: Translate a technical paragraph from English to Chinese with terminology consistency and register preservation
tasks.input:
Translate the following technical documentation excerpt into Simplified Chinese. Maintain formal register and ensure consistent terminology throughout.

"Kubernetes orchestrates containerized applications across a cluster of nodes. Each node runs a kubelet agent that communicates with the control plane via the API server. When a deployment is updated, the rolling update strategy ensures zero-downtime by gradually replacing old pods with new ones. The scheduler assigns pods to nodes based on resource requests, affinity rules, and taints/tolerations. If a node becomes unhealthy, the controller manager automatically reschedules affected pods to healthy nodes, maintaining the desired replica count specified in the deployment manifest."

scoring.5: All technical concepts accurately conveyed; no meaning loss or distortion; Kubernetes-specific terms correctly rendered (e.g., pods, nodes, kubelet, control plane, rolling update, taints/tolerations)
scoring.3: Core meaning preserved but some technical nuances lost or imprecisely rendered
scoring.1: Multiple meaning errors or significant technical inaccuracies
scoring.0: Translation is largely incorrect or incomprehensible

scoring.5: Every recurring term (node, pod, deployment, etc.) translated consistently throughout; a glossary is provided or terms are clearly standardized
scoring.3: Most terms consistent but 1-2 inconsistencies present
scoring.1: Frequent terminology variations for the same source term

scoring.5: Reads as natural Simplified Chinese technical documentation; proper sentence structure, appropriate connectors, no translationese
scoring.3: Generally readable but contains some unnatural phrasing or source-language syntax leakage
scoring.1: Awkward and clearly translated; significant translationese throughout

scoring.5: Formal technical register maintained throughout; proper Chinese punctuation; English technical terms appropriately handled (kept or translated per convention)
scoring.3: Mostly formal but some casual phrasing; minor formatting issues
scoring.1: Register mismatch — casual tone in formal document or vice versa
scoring.0: No awareness of register or formatting conventions
